status: PENDIENTE (añadida 2026-07-22, a pedido del usuario) — sin esto, la muralla se vería con el pixel-art viejo mientras todo lo demás ya es sticker. La Puerta NO va aquí: reutiliza el sprite de muralla (ver 'engine_notes.walls').
note: IMPORTANT: this single image must be a 3x1 grid of 3 equal square cells, with NO gaps, NO borders, and NO visible seams between cells, and NO cell numbering/labels drawn in the image. Each described cell below goes in its exact row/column position, reading left-to-right then top-to-bottom.
how_to_use: Copia el texto de 'full_prompt' de UNA celda a la vez y pegalo en Gemini para esa posicion exacta (fila/columna), o pega la nota 'note' de arriba una sola vez seguida de los 'full_prompt' de TODAS las celdas de este archivo en un unico mensaje para pedir la parrilla completa de una vez. Cada full_prompt ya trae TODAS las normas de estilo incluidas, no hace falta agregar nada mas.

cells.full_prompt: top-down flat sticker icon of a short horizontal stone wall segment: a thick rectangular strip of rough grey stone blocks, oriented so its long axis runs left-to-right, flat top with a subtle crenellation pattern, seen strictly from above. Camera: strict orthographic top-down bird's-eye view (90 degrees), no perspective, no isometric view, no 3/4 view. Art style: flat cardboard/sticker board-game token, thick dark cartoon outline around the entire silhouette, flat cel-shaded colors with soft internal shading for volume (no photorealistic gradients). Material/color: use NEUTRAL colors only (wood, stone, leather, cloth in earthy/green/grey/gold tones) -- do NOT paint any team color (no blue, no red); the game engine paints a colored ring/border on top for team identification, so the art itself must stay neutral. Orientation: the piece must face the TOP edge of the frame (as if moving/looking upward) -- this is mandatory, the game engine rotates the image in real time assuming 'up' = 'forward'. Background: fully transparent PNG (alpha channel) -- no scenery, no ground, no grass behind the piece. Shadow: do NOT draw any drop shadow, not even a subtle one -- the engine adds its own shadow at render time. Composition: single subject, centered, filling about 80-90% of the frame, small uniform margin. Negative prompt: no perspective, no isometric view, no 3/4 view, no side view, no photorealism, no gradients simulating depth of field, no baked drop shadow, no ground/background scenery, no text, no watermark, no grid lines, no team-colored paint (no blue, no red), not facing sideways or downward, no multiple subjects in the frame.

top-down flat sticker icon of a short vertical stone wall segment: identical style and material to the horizontal wall segment, but rotated 90 degrees so its long axis runs top-to-bottom, seen strictly from above. Camera: strict orthographic top-down bird's-eye view (90 degrees), no perspective, no isometric view, no 3/4 view. top-down flat sticker icon of a fortified wall tower segment: a squat square stone turret (wider and taller-looking than a plain wall segment, but still reads as part of a wall line, NOT a tall freestanding round tower), crenellations around its top rim, one or two small arrow-slit windows, seen strictly from above.
